text.value:
There are many "README" files in the Azure REST API specifications repository. Here are a few noteworthy ones:

1. **Lint-Diff README.md**: Located at [eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md). This would typically describe the lint-diff tool, which is used for comparing and validating differences in API spec files.

2. **App Data Plane Readme.md**: Found at [specification/app/data-plane/readme.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md). This document is likely to provide an overview and guidelines specific to the application data plane APIs.

3. **Sample Files README.md**: Available at [documentation/samplefiles/README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/documentation/samplefiles/README.md). This would typically explain the sample files provided for better understanding and usage of the API specs.

These README files usually serve as introductory guides to help users understand the structure, purpose, and usage of the components within that specific directory or project. If you have a specific aspect of the Azure REST API specifications you'd like more information about, you might want to check the relevant README for that section or component.
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
